title: Hard Rule 14/15 — reference vocabulary + mandatory claim records; acquire vector + visual
reason: Vector blueprints must not be mislabeled as ground-truth geometry. Major claims must be first-class records. Efficient path is acquire 2D profile reference + visual model, then physical teardown.
decision: Adopt Hard Rule 14: vector blueprints are 2D_DIMENSIONAL_REFERENCE / PROFILE_REFERENCE — never ground-truth geometry.
Adopt Hard Rule 15: every major claim has its own claim record (CL-*) with required fields.
Rewrite CL-001 into Hard Rule 15 shape; status CANDIDATE; next steps = body repair manual, OEM drawing, physical comparison.
Acquisition plan: (1) vector/profile reference SRC-CAND-000004, (2) visual model CAND-000042-EOG when SKU isolated, (3) eventually PHYSICAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED teardown/scan.
DT-D039 remains CANDIDATE_ACQUISITION_RECOMMENDED with corrected vocabulary.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
